message:
fix(engine): fall back to declaration-order evaluation for mixed ESM/CJS cycles

When a cycle is expected to succeed (e.g. Bun-compat mixed ESM/CJS
cycles with live binding cells), the engine now falls back to
declaration-order evaluation instead of failing the specimen outright.
This matches Bun's actual runtime behavior where CJS require() within
an ESM cycle resolves via the live binding cell mechanism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
